body_txt: The jail. The nick. The cooler. The joint. The slammer. You get the gist. If a show is set in Prison, the wardens and/or guards usually contain at least one Drill Sergeant Nasty , and there is a prevalence of gang violence, drug abuse, and Prison Rape . Due to the need to present the setting as extremely violent, dangerous and chaotic, shows set primarily in prison, such as Oz , will frequently use Red Shirt characters. See Prison Tropes and Crime and Punishment Tropes for tropes that frequently come into play in stories featuring prisons.
